detail: Refactored handle_escalating function by decomposing it into 4 helper methods: handle_escalating_kb_check, handle_escalating_decision, handle_escalation_event, and handle_escalating_stuck. This reduces the cyclomatic complexity of the main function while preserving all original logic for state transitions, agent handoffs, and error reporting.

handle_escalating refactoring complete. Function reduced from 54 lines/7 branches to ~30 lines with 4 helper methods. All original logic preserved including KB checks, escalation decisions, event handling, and stuck detection.
